queries.question: What is the lifecycle of the stadium construction project?
queries.sql:
SELECT min_years, max_years
FROM Service_Life_Expectancy AS L 
LEFT JOIN Infrastructure AS I ON I.service_life_expectancy_id = L.service_life_expectancy_id 
LEFT JOIN Projects AS P ON P.infrastructure_id = I.infrastructure_id
WHERE P.name = 'Stadium Construction'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?min_years ?max_years WHERE {
  ?l a :Service_Life_Expectancy .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?i p:hasService_Life_Expectancy ?l .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l p:min_years ?min_years .
  ?l p:max_years ?max_years .
  ?p p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(?name_f = "Stadium Construction")
}

queries.question: What is the lifecycle of the stadium construction project?
queries.sql:
SELECT frequency
FROM Renewal_Schedule AS L 
LEFT JOIN Infrastructure AS I ON I.Renewal_Schedule_id = L.Renewal_Schedule_id 
LEFT JOIN Projects AS P ON P.infrastructure_id = I.infrastructure_id
WHERE P.name = 'Stadium Construction'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?frequency WHERE {
  ?l a :Renewal_Schedule .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?i p:hasRenewal_Schedule ?l .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l p:frequency ?frequency .
  ?p p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(?name_f = "Stadium Construction")
}

queries.question: What is the lifecycle of the stadium construction project?
queries.sql:
SELECT min_years, max_years, frequency
FROM Service_Life_Expectancy AS L 
LEFT JOIN Infrastructure AS I ON I.service_life_expectancy_id = L.service_life_expectancy_id 
LEFT JOIN Projects AS P ON P.infrastructure_id = I.infrastructure_id LEFT JOIN Renewal_Schedule AS RS ON I.Renewal_Schedule_id = RS.Renewal_Schedule_id
WHERE P.name = 'Stadium Construction'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?min_years ?max_years ?frequency WHERE {
  ?l a :Service_Life_Expectancy .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?i p:hasService_Life_Expectancy ?l .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?rs a :Renewal_Schedule .
  ?i p:hasRenewal_Schedule ?rs .
  ?l p:min_years ?min_years .
  ?l p:max_years ?max_years .
  ?rs p:frequency ?frequency .
  ?p p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(?name_f = "Stadium Construction")
}

queries.question: State the service lifecycle of each project due to end in 2023
queries.sql:
SELECT name, min_years, max_years
FROM Projects AS P 
LEFT JOIN Infrastructure AS I ON P.infrastructure_id = I.infrastructure_id
LEFT JOIN Service_Life_Expectancy AS L ON I.service_life_expectancy_id = L.service_life_expectancy_id 
WHERE P.end_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?min_years ?max_years WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l a :Service_Life_Expectancy .
  ?i p:hasService_Life_Expectancy ?l .
  ?p p:name ?name .
  ?l p:min_years ?min_years .
  ?l p:max_years ?max_years .
  ?p p:end_date ?end_date_b .
  FILTER(?end_date_b >= "2023-01-01" && ?end_date_b <= "2023-12-31")
}

queries.question: What is the lifecycle of each project with an end date in 2023?
queries.sql:
SELECT name, frequency
FROM Projects AS P 
LEFT JOIN Infrastructure AS I ON P.infrastructure_id = I.infrastructure_id
LEFT JOIN Renewal_Schedule AS L ON I.Renewal_Schedule_id = L.Renewal_Schedule_id 
WHERE P.end_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?frequency WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l a :Renewal_Schedule .
  ?i p:hasRenewal_Schedule ?l .
  ?p p:name ?name .
  ?l p:frequency ?frequency .
  ?p p:end_date ?end_date_b .
  FILTER(?end_date_b >= "2023-01-01" && ?end_date_b <= "2023-12-31")
}

queries.question: What is the lifecycle of each project with an end date in 2023?
queries.sql:
SELECT name, min_years, max_years,frequency
FROM Projects AS P 
LEFT JOIN Infrastructure AS I ON P.infrastructure_id = I.infrastructure_id
LEFT JOIN Service_Life_Expectancy AS L ON I.service_life_expectancy_id = L.service_life_expectancy_id   LEFT JOIN Renewal_Schedule AS RS ON I.Renewal_Schedule_id = RS.Renewal_Schedule_id 
WHERE P.end_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?min_years ?max_years ?frequency WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l a :Service_Life_Expectancy .
  ?i p:hasService_Life_Expectancy ?l .
  ?rs a :Renewal_Schedule .
  ?i p:hasRenewal_Schedule ?rs .
  ?p p:name ?name .
  ?l p:min_years ?min_years .
  ?l p:max_years ?max_years .
  ?rs p:frequency ?frequency .
  ?p p:end_date ?end_date_b .
  FILTER(?end_date_b >= "2023-01-01" && ?end_date_b <= "2023-12-31")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the lifecycle of each project with an end date in 2023?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?min_years ?max_years WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l a :Service_Life_Expectancy .
  ?i p:hasService_Life_Expectancy ?l .
  ?p p:name ?name .
  ?l p:min_years ?min_years .
  ?l p:max_years ?max_years .
  ?p p:end_date ?end_date_b .
  FILTER(?end_date_b >= "2023-01-01" && ?end_date_b <= "2023-12-31")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name ?frequency WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l a :Renewal_Schedule .
  ?i p:hasRenewal_Schedule ?l .
  ?p p:name ?name .
  ?l p:frequency ?frequency .
  ?p p:end_date ?end_date_b .
  FILTER(?end_date_b >= "2023-01-01" && ?end_date_b <= "2023-12-31")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?min_years ?max_years ?frequency WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?i a :Infrastructure .
  ?p p:hasInfrastructure ?i .
  ?l a :Service_Life_Expectancy .
  ?i p:hasService_Life_Expectancy ?l .
  ?rs a :Renewal_Schedule .
  ?i p:hasRenewal_Schedule ?rs .
  ?p p:name ?name .
  ?l p:min_years ?min_years .
  ?l p:max_years ?max_years .
  ?rs p:frequency ?frequency .
  ?p p:end_date ?end_date_b .
  FILTER(?end_date_b >= "2023-01-01" && ?end_date_b <= "2023-12-31")
} }
}
